creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
Port NOW fails to build on 8-CURRENT.  This is caused by a change to 
8-CURRENT source at the same time the PR was submitted (8-STABLE API now 
matches 9-CURRENT), requiring another update to correct build errors on 
8-STABLE as well as 9-CURRENT.  New SHAR file attached, new source 
available online.  Please use the new SHAR file and not the one 
previously submitted.  Version bump to 1.02 .

also request priority change from medium to high since it now affects 
8-CURRENT as well.

NEW shar file attached
